experiments.title: Mandelbrot
experiments.description: The Mandelbrot set rendered on a <canvas>, with hand-tuned iteration colouring. Minimal creative coding.

experiments.title: Thomas Aquinas
experiments.description: An animated quine that endlessly rewrites itself while scrolling the Prima Via from the Summa Theologica. Esoteric and contemplative.

experiments.title: Quine Counter
experiments.description: A quine that prints its own source while incrementing a counter highlighted inside that very source. Pure code golf.

experiments.title: First Quine · 256B
experiments.description: A quine golfed down to exactly 256 bytes. The idea of self-reproduction compressed as far as it goes.

experiments.title: First Quine · v1
experiments.description: The first, readable JavaScript quine: an array of lines that reprints itself. Where it all started.

experiments.title: First Quine · v2
experiments.description: A denser second pass: destructuring, slices and printf formatting let it reproduce itself in fewer lines.

experiments.title: Quine Checker
experiments.description: A Node tool: runs a file and verifies it reproduces its own source exactly. The judge of quines.

experiments.title: Quine-Checker Quine
experiments.description: An ongoing challenge: a quine that checks whether a program is a quine. Still a stub — work in progress.
